verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in ama galte khempeuh' khutsung, leh Saul' khutsung panin amah a hotkhiat hunin David in hih la kammalte Topa' tungah a gen hi
Amah in, “ Topa , kei hong hupa, ka kulhpi, kei hong honkhiapa
ka Pasian, ka kihutna, ka buknapa, lum bangin kei a hong dal, ka munmuan'huai leh ka belh, keimah hong honkhiapa hi a, ngong hihna panin hong hon hi
A phat taak Topa ka sam a, ka galte kiang panin kei hong kihon hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna tuihualte in kei hong tum a, siatna tuikhangte in kei hong nawk hi
Leinuai khaute in kei hong kancip a, sihna thangte in kei hong dawntuah hi
Ka lungkhamna-ah Topa ka sam a, ka Pasian ka sam hi. A biakinn panin amah in ka aw hong za a, ka kikona awging ama bil a tung hi
“Tua ciangin ama hehna hangin leitung kisingin, nakpi takin kilokgawp a, vantung bulpite kilinggawp hi
A nakvang sung panin meikhu pusuak a, a kamsung panin a kangtum mei pusuak a, ama tung panin mei-am san kuangkhia hi
Amah in vantungte niamsakin hong paisuk a, ama khenuai-ah khuamial sahpi om hi
Kherub khat tungah amah tuangin hong leng a, huih khate tungah amah kimu hi
Amah in ama kimkotah khuamial bawl a, a tung kikhuhna dingin meii sahpi a zang hi
Ama mai-a a taang sung panin mei-amte kuangkhia hi
“Vantung panin Topa hong awngsuk a, Sang Penpa in a aw hong gingsak hi
Amah in thaltangte lawnin thehthang gawp a, khuaphialep phiasakin amaute a taisak hi
Tua ciangin Topa' mawhsakna awging lianpi hangin tuipi tawte kidawk a, lei bulpite a guakin om hi
“Amah in a sangna mun panin hong banin kei hong la a, tui thukpi panin kei hong kaikhia hi
A hat ka galte panin kei hong honkhia a, kei hong mudahte panin hong suaktasak hi. Keima-a' dingin ka galte hatlua uh hi
Ka kamsiat ni-in kei hong simgawp uh a, ahih hangin Topa in kei hong huh hi
Amah in mun tanzau khatah kei hong paikhiatpih a, kei tungah lungkim ahih manin kei hong honkhia hi
“Ka thumanna tawh kizui-in Topa in thaman hong pia a, ka siangthona tawh kizui-in hong dinkik hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' thu ka zui a, ka Pasian ka langpang kei hi
Ama biakna ngeina kipte hoihtakin ka zui a, ama thukhamte panin kei ka pial kei hi
Ama mai-ah kawk ka baang kei a, kisuan'na dangte panin hoihtakin ka kikem hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in ka thumanna, ama muhna-ah ka siangthona tawh kizui-in kei hong dinkik khin hi
“Thuman mi tungah nangmah na thuman a, a kawkbaanglo mi tungah a kawkbaang loin na gamta hi
A siangtho mi tungah a siangtho-in na gamta a, a thukawi mi tungah thupeelin na gamta hi
Nangmah in mi niamte na honkhia a, ahih hangin a kiphasakte na niamkhiat hi
Topa aw, nang pen keima meivak na hi hi. Ka Pasian in ka khuamial vaksak hi
Nangma hangin galkap hon khat ka sugawpzo a, ka Pasian' hangin khuakulh khat ka kanzo hi
“Hih Pasian a thu kicing a, Topa' kamciamna a manna kilang hi. Amah a beelte khempeuh-a' dingin kidalna lum ahi hi
Topa longal Pasian kua hiam? I Pasian simloh, hong hu kua hiam
Hih Pasian, a muan'huai keima belh hi a, ka lampi khempeuh lungmuan'huaisak hi
Amah in sakhipite' khe bangin ka khe kipsak a, mun sangna-ah keimah hong koih hi
Amah in galsimzia kei hong hilh a, sumngo thal khauhpente ka keekzo hi
“Nangmah in kei hong dalin na hong honkhia a, nangma hong huhna in kei hong liansak hi
Ka kalsuanna ding mun tanzau keima nuai-ah nong pia a, ka khe taallo hi
Ka galte delhin ka susia a, amaute a beitum mateng kei ka kileh kei hi
Amaute ka beisak a, amaute ka sunlet hi; amaute thokik nawnlo uh a, ka khenuai-ah amaute puk uh hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in galdona dingin tha nong guan' a, keimah hong dote ka nuai-ah na nengniam hi
Nangmah in ka galte, kei hong mudahte, na nungkiksak a, keimah in amaute ka susiagawp hi
Amaute khuadak uh a, ahih hangin a honkhia ding kuamah omlo hi. Topa' tungah hong ko uh a, ahih hangin amah in amaute dawnglo hi
“Leivui bangin amaute ka satvui a, kongzing buante bangin amaute tuankhamin ka sikcipsuk hi
Mite tawh kidona panin nangmah in nong honkhia a, minamte' lutangin kei nong bawl a, ka theih ngeiloh mite in keima na hong sem uh hi
Keimah mai-etin gamdang mite ka kiangah hong pai uh hi. Amaute in ka thu a zak phetun, ka thu hong mang uh hi
Gamdang mite lungkia uh a, a phualkip panun liingin hong paikhia uh hi
“ Topa hing hi; kei hong hupa in thupha ngah hen la, ka Pasian, kei hong honkhiapa
hong thuksakin, keima nuai-ah mite a koihsuk Pasian
ka galte kiang panin kei hong paikhiatpihpa vanglian ta hen. Nangmah in ka langte tungah kei nong liansak a, mi ngongtatte kiang panin kei nong honkhia hi
“ Topa aw, hih thu hangin minam khempeuh lakah nang kong phat ding a, na min phatna la ka sa ding hi
Zawhna lianpi ama kumpipa tungah pia a, a sathau nilhpa David leh a suanlekhakte tungah a tawntungin itna kip a lak hi,” a ci hi.
